---
params:
 y: NA
 species: NA
 uk_folname: NA
 map_yr_uk: NA
 naei_inv: NA
title: "EMEP4UK QAQC document - `r params$species` in year"
author: Sam Tomlinson


header-includes: 
 \usepackage{geometry}
 \geometry{top=2cm,left=2cm,bottom=2cm,right=2cm}
 
output:
  pdf_document
---

We will have to have some metadata, tables etc. 

I think some incoming parameters, variables, will dictate the choice of file

Can i pass the gg objects? Or maybe just code up the gg plots in here?

There should be run metadata here

\newpage

$$\\[3cm]$$

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "UK Map"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_1_UKTOTMAP.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

\newpage

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Emissions processing"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_2_UKINVBAR.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "NetCDF input data"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_3_UKNCBAR.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

\newpage

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Fig 4"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_4_UKMONTOTLINE.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Fig 5"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_5_UKMONSECLINE.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Fig 6"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_6_UKANNSECMAP.png")
```

Explanatory text stuff

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Fig 7"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_7_UKMONTOTMAP.png")
```
